description_long: This object is a small bird with a rounded body, a short tail, and a compact head. Its plumage is predominantly a rich reddish-orange on the breast and face, with darker brown or black on the head, wings, and tail. The wings are spread, revealing layered feathers with a mix of dark and lighter tones, and the tail is slender and straight. The beak is short and conical, suitable for seed eating. The legs are thin and dark, gripping a small branch with a few berries attached. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a European Robin, commonly seen in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, round-bodied bird with a reddish-orange breast, dark wings, and a short, straight tail perched on a branch.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the bird's reddish-orange breast, dark head, and spread wings with visible feather layering.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bird's rounded body, short beak, and the spread of the right wing with visible feather detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark back of the head, symmetrical spread of the wings, and the straight tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the reddish-orange breast, dark wing feathers, and the slender tail extending downward.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid reddish-orange breast and face, dark brown to black wings and head, subtle gradient on body
